info.title: Pixelbadger.Toolkit
info.description: A CLI toolkit exposing varied functionality organized by topic, including string manipulation, distance calculations, esoteric programming language interpreters, image steganography, web serving, and OpenAI integration.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CLI toolkit exposing varied functionality organized by topic

commands.name: strings
commands.description: String manipulation utilities

commands.name: reverse
commands.description: Reverses the content of a file

commands.name: levenshtein-distance
commands.description: Calculates the Levenshtein distance between two strings or files

commands.name: abjadify
commands.description: Strips English vowels from text while preserving single vowel words

commands.name: flesch-reading-ease
commands.description: Analyzes plain text readability using the Flesch Reading Ease score

commands.name: interpreters
commands.description: Esoteric programming language interpreters

commands.name: brainfuck
commands.description: Executes a Brainfuck program from a file

commands.name: ook
commands.description: Executes an Ook program from a file

commands.name: bf-to-ook
commands.description: Converts a Brainfuck program to Ook language

commands.name: images
commands.description: Image processing and manipulation utilities

commands.name: steganography
commands.description: Encode or decode hidden messages in images using LSB steganography

commands.name: web
commands.description: Web server utilities

commands.name: serve-html
commands.description: Serves a static HTML file via HTTP server

commands.name: openai
commands.description: OpenAI utilities

commands.name: chat
commands.description: Chat with OpenAI maintaining conversation history

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Translate text to a target language using OpenAI

commands.name: ocaaar
commands.description: Extract text from an image and translate it to pirate speak

commands.name: corpospeak
commands.description: Rewrite text for enterprise audiences with optional idiolect adaptation

commands.name: oauth
commands.description: OAuth utilities for managing profiles and acquiring tokens

commands.name: token
commands.description: Acquire an OAuth access token using Resource Owner Password Credentials

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Manage OAuth profiles

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a new OAuth profile

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing OAuth profile

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete an OAuth profile
